Record Class ProjectedVertex

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.soulfiremc.server.renderer.ProjectedVertex
public record ProjectedVertex(float x, float y, float depth, float inverseW, float uOverW, float vOverW, float sphericalFogDistanceOverW, float cylindricalFogDistanceOverW, float aOverW, float rOverW, float gOverW, float bOverW, float overlayAOverW, float overlayROverW, float overlayGOverW, float overlayBOverW) extends Record
A projected vertex with perspective-correct interpolation data precomputed.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProjectedVertex

      public ProjectedVertex(float x, float y, float depth, float inverseW, float uOverW, float vOverW, float aOverW, float rOverW, float gOverW, float bOverW)

    • ProjectedVertex

      public ProjectedVertex(float x, float y, float depth, float inverseW, float uOverW, float vOverW, float sphericalFogDistanceOverW, float cylindricalFogDistanceOverW, float aOverW, float rOverW, float gOverW, float bOverW, float overlayAOverW, float overlayROverW, float overlayGOverW, float overlayBOverW)
      Creates an instance of a ProjectedVertex record class.
      Parameters:
      x - the value for the x record component
      y - the value for the y record component
      depth - the value for the depth record component
      inverseW - the value for the inverseW record component
      uOverW - the value for the uOverW record component
      vOverW - the value for the vOverW record component
      sphericalFogDistanceOverW - the value for the sphericalFogDistanceOverW record component
      cylindricalFogDistanceOverW - the value for the cylindricalFogDistanceOverW record component
      aOverW - the value for the aOverW record component
      rOverW - the value for the rOverW record component
      gOverW - the value for the gOverW record component
      bOverW - the value for the bOverW record component
      overlayAOverW - the value for the overlayAOverW record component
      overlayROverW - the value for the overlayROverW record component
      overlayGOverW - the value for the overlayGOverW record component
      overlayBOverW - the value for the overlayBOverW record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
